test.name: dashql_viz_line_full
test.input: VIZ weather_avg USING LINE ( area = (x = 0, y = 0, w = 4, h = 15), padding = (top = 2.0, left = 2.0, right = 0, bottom = 0), title = ( display = true, position = 'top', font_size = 12, font_family = 'Helvetica', font_color = '#666', font_style = 'bold', padding = 10, line_height = 1.2, text = 'foo' ), legend = ( display = true, position = 'top', align = 'center', full_width = false, reverse = false, rtl = false, labels = ['a', 'b', 'c'] ), tooltip = ( enabled = true, mode = 'nearest', intersect = true, position = 'average', title = ( font_size = 12, font_style = 'bold', font_color = '#fff', font_align = 'left', font_family = 'Helvetica', margin = (bottom = 6), spacing = 2 ), body = ( font_size = 11, align = 'left' ), footer = ( font_size = 11, align = 'left' ), padding = (left = 2, right = 4), caret_padding = 2, caret_size = 5, corner_radius = 6 ) )
